'''Valrar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Valrar system/Legends|Valrar system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Its dense canopy forests blocked most sunlight from reaching the planet's surface. [[Khabarakh]] was reassigned here by [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] after his failure to capture [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="DFR">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref>
